generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our allies. But have you seen how much we're spending on defense compared to what others contribute? It's time our partners step up. We can't keep carrying the burden alone while they enjoy the security. #StrongAlliances #FairShare
